title: epipactis latifolia subsp. atrorubens
intro: Epipactis latifolia subsp. atrorubens, also known as the broad-leaved helleborine, is a subspecies of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis latifolia subsp. atrorubens include reducing inflammation, treating coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
